skill.name: maxhub-xigua
skill.description: Access Xigua Video platform data through MaxHub API for content search, video information retrieval, user analytics, and comment data collection.
skill.summary: Xigua Video data integration skill for content search and analytics via MaxHub API proxy.
skill.author: MaxHub Team

security_audit.summary: All 72 static findings evaluated as false positives. The skill is a legitimate API integration for Xigua Video data access. Environment variables (MAXHUB_API_KEY, MAXHUB_BASE_URL) are properly documented for authentication. URL paths and API endpoints in documentation triggered backtick detection but are not actual shell commands. Network access is limited to user-configured MaxHub API endpoint. No filesystem access, no platform manipulation operations. All security controls are properly documented in metadata.

content.user_title: Access Xigua Video Data via MaxHub API
content.value_statement: Need to search Xigua Video content or analyze creator data? This skill connects Claude to Xigua Video through MaxHub API proxy, enabling content search, video analytics, and creator insights without direct API integration.
actual_capabilities: Search Xigua Video content by keyword with relevance ranking
Fetch individual video details including views, likes, and engagement metrics
Retrieve user profile information and follower statistics
Get user video lists with performance metrics
Access video comment threads for sentiment analysis
Chain multiple API calls for comprehensive content analysis
limitations: API key required from MaxHub platform (registration at aconfig.cn)
Rate limited to 60 calls per minute by default
Only accesses public data; private videos and accounts not available
Maximum 5 pages per query to prevent excessive API usage

use_cases.title: Content Creator Research
use_cases.description: Find top-performing Xigua Video content on specific topics for content strategy inspiration. Search keywords and analyze video performance metrics.
use_cases.target_user: Content creators and marketers researching trending topics

use_cases.title: Creator Analytics Dashboard
use_cases.description: Analyze a content creator's performance by fetching their profile, video list, and engagement metrics to build comparative analytics.
use_cases.target_user: Social media managers tracking creator performance

use_cases.title: Video Performance Monitoring
use_cases.description: Monitor specific video performance over time by retrieving current metrics including views, likes, comments, and shares.
use_cases.target_user: Brand managers tracking video campaign performance

prompt_templates.title: Search Xigua Videos
prompt_templates.prompt: Search Xigua Video for content about {topic}. Find the top 10 most relevant videos with their titles, view counts, and upload dates.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants to find videos on a specific topic

prompt_templates.title: Get Video Details
prompt_templates.prompt: Get detailed information for this Xigua Video: {video_id}. Include title, description, view count, like count, comment count, and uploader info.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user provides a specific video ID and wants full details

prompt_templates.title: Analyze Creator Profile
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze the Xigua Video creator with ID {user_id}. Get their profile info, total video count, total views, and list their 10 most recent videos with performance metrics.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants comprehensive creator analysis

prompt_templates.title: Batch Content Research
prompt_templates.prompt: Research the top 5 Xigua Video creators in the {category} category. For each creator, get their follower count, total videos, and average engagement rate.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user needs multi-creator comparative analysis

best_practices: Configure MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable before use; register at aconfig.cn for API access
Use pagination wisely; request only needed pages to minimize API costs
Chain API calls strategically: search first to get IDs, then fetch details for specific content
Monitor your MaxHub account balance during batch operations to avoid unexpected costs
anti_patterns: Do not request all pages at once; use pagination parameters to fetch data progressively
Do not make multiple parallel requests without rate limit awareness; respect 60 calls/minute
Do not assume private videos are accessible; this skill only retrieves publicly available data

faq.question: How do I get an API key for this skill?
faq.answer: Register at aconfig.cn, create an account, and generate an API key in the dashboard. Set it as the MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable.

faq.question: What data can I access from Xigua Video?
faq.answer: You can access public video metadata (titles, views, likes, comments), user profiles, and video lists. Private videos and user data are not accessible.

faq.question: Is there a rate limit?
faq.answer: Yes, default limit is 60 calls per minute. The skill will warn you when approaching limits and will not auto-execute high-cost batch operations.

faq.question: Can I analyze multiple videos at once?
faq.answer: Yes, but batch operations have a maximum of 10 items per request. The skill will inform you of estimated costs before executing batch operations.

faq.question: What happens if I exceed the API rate limit?
faq.answer: The API will return rate limit errors. The skill includes built-in protection to warn before exceeding limits and to pause when limits are hit.

faq.question: Does this skill store any data locally?
faq.answer: No. This skill only makes API calls and returns data; it does not write to local filesystem or store credentials.
